offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We streamline invoicing instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage on Indie Hackers about invoicing tools
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Join forums where Etsy sellers discuss workflows
try_it: Let users try simple invoice generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for payments
Allow CSV import for existing invoice data
Enable one-click export of basic reports
Simplify onboarding steps for new users
